description: Sybil cluster v0.1 · rule-based union-find on counterparty graph Jaccard similarity. Wallets with heavy top-counterparty overlap (jaccard≥0.50 OR ≥5 shared top with strength≥50) are clustered as likely-same-entity. NOT machine-learning · published heuristic per TOP RULE -1.
note: v0.1 ships rule-based clustering · counterparty_graph SMOKE_PREVIEW limits coverage to ~0.22% tx · v0.2 uses full backfill after Railway-volume / cache.db refactor (Month 2). Confidence reflects v0.1 evidence strength · NOT a probability claim.
